name: agent_capability_phase31_windows_lock_abort_evidence
prompt_lines: 请执行一次 Phase 31 Windows Computer Use 锁、急停和证据链验收：只使用内存后端、临时锁目录和临时审计目录，验证 stale lock 恢复、动作前后 evidence chain、磁盘审计脱敏、abort 阻断下一次动作，以及 /computer abort/clear-abort 终端入口，不要移动鼠标，不要点击真实桌面，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE31_WINDOWS_LOCK_ABORT_EVIDENCE_READY。

你必须调用终端工具执行这个安全命令验证协议：$env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "import json, tempfile; from pathlib import Path; from learning_agent.app.interactive import run_computer_terminal_command; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.audit import ComputerUseAuditStore; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.controller import ComputerUseController, MemoryComputerUseBackend; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.lock import ComputerUseLockManager; secret='phase31-visible-secret-password'; window={'app_id':'notepad.exe','window_id':'hwnd:3101','title_preview':'Phase31 Notepad','rect':{'left':30,'top':40,'right':330,'bottom':240}}; temp=tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(); root=Path(temp.name); stale=ComputerUseLockManager(base_dir=root/'stale_locks', stale_after_seconds=0); first=stale.acquire('old-session', owner_label='crashed-visible'); recovery=stale.acquire('new-session', owner_label='recovery-visible'); lock=ComputerUseLockManager(base_dir=root/'locks'); audit=ComputerUseAuditStore(base_dir=root/'audit'); backend=MemoryComputerUseBackend(windows=[window]); c=ComputerUseController(backend=backend, lock_manager=lock, audit_store=audit, owner_session_id='phase31-visible'); lock.acquire('phase31-visible', owner_label='visible-terminal'); click=c.execute({'action':'click','confirm_desktop_control':True,'window':window,'x':4,'y':8}); typed=c.execute({'action':'type_text','confirm_desktop_control':True,'window':window,'text':secret}); evidence=click.data.get('action_evidence',{}); chain_path=Path(evidence.get('chain_path','')); serialized=json.dumps({'events':audit.read_events(),'chains':audit.read_chains()}, ensure_ascii=False); raw_text_hidden=secret not in serialized; lock.request_abort('visible terminal abort'); abort=c.execute({'action':'click','confirm_desktop_control':True,'window':window,'x':1,'y':1}); terminal_abort=run_computer_terminal_command(root/'workspace','/computer abort phase31-visible'); terminal_clear=run_computer_terminal_command(root/'workspace','/computer clear-abort'); recovered=bool(first.get('acquired')) and bool(recovery.get('acquired')) and recovery['status']['recovered_stale_owner_session_id']=='old-session'; before_link=evidence.get('before_evidence',{}).get('audit_id')==click.data.get('audit_id'); after_link=evidence.get('after_evidence',{}).get('audit_id')==click.data.get('audit_id'); coord_ok=backend.actions[0]['x']==34 and backend.actions[0]['y']==48; terminal_abort_ok='abort_requested=true' in terminal_abort; terminal_clear_ok='abort_requested=false' in terminal_clear; assert click.ok and typed.ok and (not abort.ok) and recovered and chain_path.exists() and before_link and after_link and raw_text_hidden and coord_ok and terminal_abort_ok and terminal_clear_ok; print('PHASE31_WINDOWS_LOCK_ABORT_EVIDENCE_OK recovered='+str(recovered).lower()+' chain='+str(chain_path.exists()).lower()+' before='+str(before_link).lower()+' after='+str(after_link).lower()+' abort_blocked='+str((not abort.ok)).lower()+' raw_text_hidden='+str(raw_text_hidden).lower()+' terminal_abort='+str(terminal_abort_ok).lower()+' terminal_clear='+str(terminal_clear_ok).lower()+' coord='+str(backend.actions[0]['x'])+','+str(backend.actions[0]['y']))"

不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE31_WINDOWS_LOCK_ABORT_EVIDENCE_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE31_WINDOWS_LOCK_ABORT_EVIDENCE_READY PHASE31_WINDOWS_LOCK_ABORT_EVIDENCE_OK recovered=true chain=true before=true after=true abort_blocked=true raw_text_hidden=true terminal_abort=true terminal_clear=true coord=34,48
